phrases.intent_en: Ask where the away supporters section is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le secteur réservé aux supporters visiteurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh sek-TUR ray-zair-VAY oh soo-por-TUR vee-zee-TUR
phrases.cultural_note: The Stadium Municipal is home to Toulouse FC (TFC), who play in Ligue 1; visiting supporters are housed in a separate section.

responses.english: In the visitors' stand, north side.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the ticket office before the match
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la billetterie avant le match ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah bee-yet-REE ah-VAHN luh MATCH
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket offices at French stadiums can have long queues; purchasing online in advance is strongly recommended.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on your right.
responses.phonetic: ah lahn-TRAY prahn-see-PAHL soor VOH-truh DRWAHT
responses.french: À l'entrée principale, sur votre droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest metro station is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la station de métro la plus proche du stade ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah stah-SYON duh may-TROH lah plyoo PROSH doo STAD
phrases.cultural_note: Toulouse metro line A stops at Basso Cambo, from which you can walk or take a shuttle to the stadium on match days.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the stadium offers guided tours
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que le stade propose des visites guidées ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh luh STAD proh-POHZ day vee-ZEET ghee-DAY
phrases.cultural_note: Stadium tours give access to the changing rooms, pitch-side, and the press box; check TFC's official website for schedules.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what food is available inside the ground
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qu'on peut manger dans le stade ?
phrases.pronunciation: kes-KON puh mahn-ZHAY dahn luh STAD
phrases.cultural_note: Concession stands inside French stadiums typically sell hot dogs, sandwiches, frites, and beer; local specialities sometimes appear on derby days.

responses.english: There are food stands inside the ground.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day STAHND duh res-toh-rah-SYOHN dahn lahn-SAHNT
responses.french: Il y a des stands de restauration dans l'enceinte.
